name: Jerk Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Fresh thyme leaves or 1 tablespoon fresh thyme leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor fitted with a steel blade, combine all the ingredients except the chicken wings.
2. Process for 10 to 15 seconds at high speed.
3. Pour the marinade into a bowl and add the chicken wings.
4. Refrigerate for 4 to 6 hours, stirring after 3 hours.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
6. Remove the wings from the marinade and place them on a rack on a baking sheet.
7. Bake until they are browned, 15 to 20 minutes.
8. Arrange the chicken wings on leaf lettuce and serve immediately with cold beverages.
